page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package provides functions to perform single SNP association analyses and gene-based tests for continuous, binary and survival traits against sequencing data (e.g. exome chip) using family data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package provides functions to perform single SNP association analyses and gene-based tests for continuous, binary and survival traits against sequencing data (e.g. exome chip) using family data.
